theme_notes: FIFA World Cup 2026 Final tomorrow (Spain vs Argentina at MetLife, Shakira/Madonna halftime) and the escalating US-Iran Strait of Hormuz military crisis with rising oil prices and US service members killed. Secondary riffs: SpaceX Starship Flight 13 auto-abort, scientists confirming an atmosphere on a potentially habitable exoplanet, Andy Burnham becoming UK Prime Minister.
settled: Even. The Strait of Hormuz wishes it were this calm.
Zero. Shakira won't be writing a song about you two. This time.
You're square. Starship aborted its launch — you actually landed.
youOwe: Less than a barrel of crude costs extra this week. Still, pay it.
World Cup souvenir-scarf territory. At least they have something to show.
This is rounding-error money. The app does not round.
You owe the price of a World Cup jersey you'll never wear in public.
Iran's blockading a strait. You're blockading Venmo.
Andy Burnham is running the UK now. You can't run a tab.
Nosebleed seats at the World Cup Final. That's what you owe.
Oil's spiking in the Strait. So is your guilt.
Scientists found an atmosphere 49 light-years away. You're still here dodging.
The World Cup halftime has Shakira, Madonna, and BTS. Your repayment has nothing.
The Hormuz crisis cost lives. This is costing a friendship.
SpaceX aborted Starship Flight 13 on the pad. Same energy as your payment plan.
Argentina's chasing a fourth World Cup title. You're chasing solvency.
You owe enough to fund a minor Strait of Hormuz naval deterrent. Reflect.
Starship keeps aborting launch. So does your attempt to clear this debt.
Spain and Argentina are playing for a cup. You're playing for your dignity.
The US and Iran are trading strikes daily. You should be trading payments.
Scientists found a habitable planet 49 light-years away. Consider relocating.
theyOwe: They owe you less than a World Cup matchday program. Still yours.
A rounding error. The Hormuz oil markets have bigger ones. Collect anyway.
Starship aborted mid-countdown. They're doing the same with your cash.
Enough for a World Cup jersey. Not enough for their accountability, apparently.
Oil spiked in the Strait this week. Their guilt level should too.
Andy Burnham just became UK PM. Your partner is still procrastinating.
You could've had nosebleeds at the World Cup Final. Instead you have this IOU.
The US launched five strikes in a week. One invoice from you should be enough.
An exoplanet with breathable air was just confirmed. Your patience has expired.
Shakira's performing at the World Cup Final. They're performing financial amnesia.
The Strait of Hormuz is a crisis. Your friendship is approaching that territory.
Starship Flight 13 aborted on the pad. Your goodwill is about to follow.
48 countries chased the World Cup. One person owes you this much. One.
This covers a Hormuz escort detail or one attorney retainer. You decide.
Scientists found life 49 light-years away. Still no sign of their Venmo.
Spain and Argentina went to war for a cup. Go to war for your money.
The US and Iran escalate daily. You've been too patient for too long.
